title: Simplebuilding
description: A simple building mod. Create Faster, Farm Faster, Enjoy The Game Without Loosing Your Soul!
body:
# 🏗️ SimpleBuilding
**(Mod ID: `simplebuilding`)**

![Icon Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/983e18266fd2731fa41a9911d98945837cf2e6bc.png)

Build bigger. Mine faster. Keep it survival-friendly.

SimpleBuilding is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 focused on practical building gameplay:
- High-impact construction tools
- Better inventory flow
- Endgame progression (Enderite, Astralit, Nihilith)
- Powerful but configurable world integration

### [📚 Read the Full Documentation](https://github.com/Ouzzi/simplebuilding)

## Highlights

- Building Wands up to Enderite tier (large area placement)
- Sledgehammers for area mining with depth and override options
- Chisel + Spatula for instant in-world block variant cycling
- Octant range/shape planner with HUD overlays
- Reinforced/Netherite/Enderite Bundles and Quivers
- Reinforced machines (furnace/smoker/blast furnace/hopper/piston variants)
- Enderite Spear and Enderite full tool + armor line
- 19 custom enchantments
- Armor trim gameplay bonuses with progression scaling

## Why it feels good in Survival

- Works with normal progression instead of replacing it
- Adds meaningful loot/trade reasons to explore structures
- Keeps settings configurable (trades, loot injections, trim benefits, animations)
- Supports utility-heavy base building without creative-mode shortcuts

## Enchantments (Quick List)

fast_chiseling, constructors_touch, range, deep_pockets, master_builder, funnel, radius, override, strip_miner, cover, bridge, linear, vein_miner, kinetic_protection, drawer, versatility, color_palette, break_through, double_jump

## Included World Integration

- End ore generation for Astralit and Nihilith
- Villager trade pools (Librarian, Mason, Toolsmith)
- Wandering Trader offers
- Loot additions in major vanilla structures

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader 0.18.4+
- Fabric API
- Java 21

Recommended:
- Mod Menu
- Cloth Config

## Full Documentation

For the complete feature and content reference (all systems, items, blocks, enchants, config, commands):
- See the main repository readme in this project.
